title: Irish Beef Bake
description: A hearty Irish dish featuring tender beef and a crispy, cheesy top.
instructions: Season beef with salt and pepper.
In a large bowl, combine flour, Irish mustard, and a pinch of salt.
Toss beef in flour mixture to coat.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high.
Sear beef until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer beef to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix buttermilk, cheddar cheese, and a pinch of salt.
Cover dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until cheese is golden brown and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped onion.
